articles.title: Married at First Sight UK brides tell BBC they were raped by on-screen husbands
articles.description: Channel 4 was aware of one of the rape claims before broadcast, but the woman involved still featured in the show.

articles.title: New High Street crime unit to target gangs fronting shops after BBC investigation
articles.description: It follows BBC News exposing drug gangs, money laundering, immigration crime, and ghost directors linked to shop fronts.

articles.title: Teen suspects fatally shoot three in suspected hate crime at San Diego mosque
articles.description: The alleged attackers were aged 17 and 18 and one left a note containing "generalised hate rhetoric", investigators say.

articles.title: Trump says he called off new Iran attack at request of Gulf states
articles.description: The US president says he is holding off on a US attack planned for Tuesday as "serious negotiations are now taking place".
